zh.Mickleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino: 英國英格蘭越可爾米可萊頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Lascelles於1360年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Sir Walter de Lascelles20歲，母親Isabell Eland10歲。他於大約1391年與Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1428年在他的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.Mickleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino: 英国英格兰越可爾米可萊頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Lascelles于1360年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Sir Walter de Lascelles20岁，母亲Isabell Eland10岁。他于大约1391年与Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1428年在他的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lascelles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one of the large number of places in northern France called Celle, Celles, Lacelle, Leschelle, or Lachelle, all from French celle ‘hermitage’, and at different times occurring both with and without the plural -s.
Variant of   Lacelle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Laswell
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Lascelles  . This surname is also found as   Lacefield  .

variants.name: Lacelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Andre, Aurele, Benoit, Cecile, Marcel, Marie Paule.
Altered form of French Laselle: habitational name from La Selle, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Laselle is very rare in France, found in Marne. Compare Lascelles .

In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Lacelle in Corrèze or numerous minor places called La Celle, all named for a monastic cell or hermitage in their vicinity, from French celle ‘hermitage’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Lascelles was born in 1360, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Walter de Lascelles, was 20 and his mother, Isabell Eland, was 10. He married Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby about 1391, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1428, in his hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Lascelles est né en 1360, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Walter de Lascelles, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Isabell Eland, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby environ 1391, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1428, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Lascelles 1360 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter de Lascelles 20 und seine Mutter Isabell Eland 10. Er hat um 1391 in England Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1428 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Lascelles è nato il nel 1360 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Walter de Lascelles, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Isabell Eland, aveva 10 anni. Lui sposato Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby circa 1391, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1428, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Lascellesが1360年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Walter de Lascellesは20歳，母Isabell Elandは10歳であった。約1391年にイギリスでLady Isabel Elizabeth Barnbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1428年に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Lascelles(이)가 1360년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter de Lascelles(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell Eland(은)는 10세였다. 그는 대략 1391년 영국에서 Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1428년 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Mickleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino: Mickleton, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Lascelles nasceu em 1360, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Walter de Lascelles, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Isabell Eland, tinha 10 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby aproximadamente 1391, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1428, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Lascelles родился в 1360 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Walter de Lascelles было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell Eland, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby около 1391 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1428 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Lascelles nació en 1360, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Walter de Lascelles, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Isabell Eland, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby aproximadamente 1391, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1428, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
